SELECT list_value(id, id + 1, id + 2) FROM test_list;
SELECT list_value(1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_list), 2 * (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_list)) AS list_result;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT, customer_id INT);
SELECT o.order_id, list_value(o.order_id, c.customer_id) AS order_customer_list FROM orders o JOIN test_list c ON o.customer_id = c.id;
SELECT list_value(SELECT id FROM test_list WHERE id > 1);
SELECT list_value(1, 2, (SELECT SUM(id) FROM test_list)) AS list_with_sum;
SELECT list_value(value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_test WHERE value > 15)) FROM nested_test;
SELECT list_value((SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_list), (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_list));
SELECT list_value((SELECT list_value(value) FROM nested_test) WHERE value > 15);
